items.title: Sleepless in Tehran as crowds rally behind the flag
items.summary: A slogan on a wall nearby in Farsi read, “Meydan bashuma, khayabane ba ma.” ‘The battlefield is yours. The streets are ours.’ Addressed to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), it was a message to the soldiers to focus on the battlefield with ordinary Iranians in control of their homes.
